title: SCP-330, Take only two
description: A harmless-looking bowl of candy that hides a deadly rule... take only two.
body:
Take only two adds a new item. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-330, also known as Take only two.


This anomalous candy bowl can be found inside its containment chamber. The anomaly tempts players with colorful candies that each grant powerful temporary effects. However, greed comes at a cost. Taking more than two candies results in instant death. The bowl resets its curse upon the player’s death, allowing another chance to resist temptation.

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Where does SCP-330 spawn?

SCP-330 spawns in a containment chamber, usually underground in the overworld. There may be multiple SCP-330.

</details>



![SCP-330](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ecfecf21e0ebc01b3d337036f0ab7fe76688212.png)

SCP-330 appears as a simple iron bowl filled with candies of various colors. When interacted with, it dispenses candies that grant random effects for one minute. Red for regeneration, yellow for haste, blue for speed, green for jump boost, orange for fire resistance, purple for night vision, and pink, which violently explodes. The first time a player takes candy, they are warned with the message “Take no more than two please!!”. Taking a third piece, however, will instantly kill the player, leaving behind a grim reminder of what happens when curiosity turns to greed. If a player dies, the counter resets, allowing the player to take two candies again.

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
